race.comment: DENMAN FORCE (17) made it two wins from just four starts when he took control a fair way from home then dug deep to score over 1000m at Orange last start. Had the better of a couple of today's key rivals that day. Still improving and has a great will to win. WONDER STEP (6) got a long way back and struggled to quicken under 61kgs when resuming in the race won by DENMAN FORCE at Orange recently. Has an excellent record at 1100m but is yet to place in three second-up runs. Should be in the finish. BROGANS CREEK (16) flashed home to finish a close third to DENMAN FORCE when they clashed at Orange a fortnight ago. Fitter for that first run in 15 weeks. Veteran who retains a zest for racing. PLENITUDE (11) is back from a seven-month spell. Competitive in better races than this last prep. Trialling very well and looks set for a strong return. SINGING STAR (7) has been freshened up and has placed at all four runs over today's journey. Must be included in calculations.
